## Phase 0 Execution Confirmation

> I am independent-assurance-agent operating in Phase 0 PRE-BRIEF mode.
> I did NOT execute Phase 2–4 assurance. This artifact declares what will be required at handover.
> Adoption phase: PHASE_B_BLOCKING — Hard gate ACTIVE.

---

## Wave Summary

**Root cause addressed**: `T-W13-E2E-4` and `T-W13-E2E-5` in
`modules/mat/tests/wave13/e2e-live-deployment.test.ts` used
`client.auth.setSession({ access_token, refresh_token })` with secrets
`MAT_E2E_TEST_TOKEN` and `MAT_E2E_REFRESH_TOKEN`. Refresh tokens are single-use and expire
after each CI run — requiring manual rotation every run.

**Solution applied**: Replaced `setSession` with `signInWithPassword({ email, password })`
using `LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL` and `LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` (pre-existing, stable, non-expiring
GitHub Actions secrets).

---

## 3. FFA Checks to Run at Handover

### Core Invariants (applicable to ALL categories)

| Check ID | Check Name | Why Applicable |
|---|---|---|
| CORE-007 | No placeholder content | Test file and workflow must be complete with no TODOs or stubs |
| CORE-013 | IAA invocation evidence | PREHANDOVER proof must reference IAA token; evidence of this invocation must be present |
| CORE-015 | Session memory present | Session memory artifact required in PR bundle |
| CORE-016 | IAA verdict evidenced (§4.3b) | Dedicated IAA token file must exist at `.agent-admin/assurance/iaa-token-session-NNN-...md` |
| CORE-017 | No unauthorized `.github/agents/` modifications | PR diff must not contain `.github/agents/` changes (none expected here; verify at handover) |
| CORE-018 | Complete evidence artifact sweep | All four evidence artifacts must be present and non-empty before overlay checks |
| CORE-019 | IAA token cross-verification | `iaa_audit_token` field must match the token file; token file must reference this PR |
| CORE-020 | Zero partial pass rule | Any unverifiable check = REJECTION-PACKAGE |
| CORE-021 | Zero-severity-tolerance | No "minor/trivial" bypasses — all findings require REJECTION-PACKAGE |

### AAWP_MAT Overlay (BD Checks — applicable subset)

| Check ID | Check Name | Why Applicable |
|---|---|---|
| BD-001 | Full scope delivered | Both T-W13-E2E-4 and T-W13-E2E-5 must be updated; both CI env vars must be changed |
| BD-002 | No stub/TODO in production paths | Test code must be complete; no unimplemented branches |
| BD-003 | One-time build compliance | If merged today, will CI run succeed without further intervention? No more manual token rotation. |
| BD-011 | 100% test pass rate | Evidence of tests passing (or expected green gate) required |
| BD-012 | Zero test debt | No `.skip()`, `.only()`, or commented-out assertions in changed test code |
| BD-013 | No test dodging | `signInWithPassword` must be actually asserted — not a vacuous pass |
| BD-016 | No hardcoded secrets or credentials | Verify no `LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL` or `LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` values are hardcoded in the test file — must be read from `process.env` only |

### CI_WORKFLOW Overlay

| Check ID | Check Name | Why Applicable |
|---|---|---|
| OVL-CI-001 | Workflow policy correctness | Verify the CWT job env block correctly maps `LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL` and `LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` to the correct secret refs; verify the old tokens are fully removed |
| OVL-CI-002 | Merge gate integrity | Confirm no merge gate checks have been removed or weakened by the workflow change |
| OVL-CI-003 | Silent failure risk | Verify `signInWithPassword` error is properly asserted in both tests — not swallowed |
| OVL-CI-004 | Environment parity | `LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL`/`LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` must be available in all environments where the E2E test runs; confirm secrets are in GitHub Actions |
| OVL-CI-005 | CI evidence present | PREHANDOVER must include a CI run URL or log snippet confirming the workflow executed successfully after the change. **This is a hard requirement.** |

## 4. Required PREHANDOVER Proof Structure

The integration-builder must commit a PREHANDOVER proof containing **all** of the following.
Any missing item = REJECTION-PACKAGE on CORE-018 before overlay checks proceed.

### Mandatory Fields

```
## PREHANDOVER Proof — T-E2E-AUTH-001
wave: fix-e2e-test-auth-method
task_id: T-E2E-AUTH-001
date: YYYY-MM-DD
builder: integration-builder
branch: copilot/fix-e2e-test-auth-method
commit_sha: <actual SHA>
```

### Mandatory Evidence Sections

| # | Section | Requirement |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Scope confirmation** | Confirm both T-W13-E2E-4 and T-W13-E2E-5 changed; confirm `.github/workflows/deploy-mat-ai-gateway.yml` CWT env block updated |
| 2 | **setSession removal evidence** | Quote the diff or line numbers showing `setSession` removed and `signInWithPassword` inserted for each test |
| 3 | **Env var migration evidence** | Quote the workflow diff showing `MAT_E2E_TEST_TOKEN` and `MAT_E2E_REFRESH_TOKEN` removed, and `LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL` and `LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` added |
| 4 | **No hardcoded credentials** | Explicit statement that no credential values are hardcoded — all read from `process.env` |
| 5 | **CI run evidence** | URL or log excerpt from a CI run showing the CWT job (or E2E test step) passing after this change. **Required for OVL-CI-005.** |
| 6 | **Test debt declaration** | Explicit statement: no `.skip()`, `.only()`, or commented-out assertions in changed tests |
| 7 | **Session memory reference** | Path to the session memory file committed on this branch |
| 8 | **IAA audit token field** | `iaa_audit_token: IAA-session-NNN-fix-e2e-test-auth-method-YYYYMMDD-PASS` (pre-populated reference format accepted; must not be `PENDING`, `TBD`, or blank) |

---

## 5. Scope Blockers and Governance Conflicts Identified Now

### ⚠️ BLOCKER — OVL-CI-005: CI Evidence Required

The workflow file (`.github/workflows/deploy-mat-ai-gateway.yml`) has been modified.
Per OVL-CI-005, the PREHANDOVER proof **must** include a CI run URL or log excerpt confirming
the workflow executed successfully post-change. This cannot be waived.

**Action required from integration-builder**: After committing the changes, trigger a CI run
on this branch and include the run URL in the PREHANDOVER proof before requesting IAA assurance.

### ℹ️ ADVISORY — Secret Availability in CI

`LIVENESS_TEST_EMAIL` and `LIVENESS_TEST_PASSWORD` are stated to already be present in GitHub
Actions secrets. If they are not present, the E2E tests will fail with an `expect(email).toBeTruthy()`
assertion error rather than an auth error. The PREHANDOVER proof should explicitly confirm
these secrets are configured in the repository's GitHub Actions secret store.

### ℹ️ ADVISORY — Single-use Token Secrets Retirement

The PREHANDOVER proof should note whether `MAT_E2E_TEST_TOKEN` and `MAT_E2E_REFRESH_TOKEN`
secrets will be retired from the GitHub Actions secret store, or if they remain for other uses.
This is advisory only — the workflow has correctly removed their usage.

### ✅ NO GOVERNANCE CONFLICTS

- No `.github/agents/` files are modified — CORE-017 not at risk
- No canon or governance files are modified — no CANON_GOVERNANCE trigger
- No agent contracts are modified — no AGENT_CONTRACT trigger
- No agent class exemption claims — CORE-014 not at risk
